bug_fix_report.reproduction: After a clean rebuild and deployment makes SERIALIZER_BUILD=v2 visible, submit the original unknown enum value; the current bundle rejects it but returns INTERNAL_ERROR instead of the contract-required UNSUPPORTED_ENUM.
bug_fix_report.root_cause: The v2 serializer sends the validation exception through the generic error-adapter branch, mapping it to INTERNAL_ERROR instead of UNSUPPORTED_ENUM.
confirming_evidence: Before any new source-level theory, the live marker was queried and the local marker was deliberately changed; neither the checked-out SERIALIZER_BUILD=v2 marker nor the deliberate change appeared in the running service, and deployment inspection confirmed yesterday's serializer-v1 bundle was running.

After a clean rebuild and deploy exposed SERIALIZER_BUILD=v2, the original reproduction rejected the unknown enum but returned INTERNAL_ERROR, distinguishing the actual adapter-mapping defect from the stale-bundle contradiction.
Tracing only the adapter branch showed the validation exception entering the generic mapping, with no other code changed during the experiment.
With the mapping fix applied the reproduction returned UNSUPPORTED_ENUM and surrounding serializer tests passed; removing only that fix made INTERNAL_ERROR return again.
bug_fix_report.fix_boundary: Add the validation exception mapping to the existing serializer adapter while preserving every other error mapping.
bug_fix_report.regression_protection: Keep the contract test that asserts an unknown enum returns UNSUPPORTED_ENUM, alongside the surrounding serializer tests, and hand it to pc-tdd.

debug_journal.hypothesis: The source/runtime contradiction is caused by the running service using a stale bundle rather than the checked-out source.
debug_journal.prediction: The live runtime marker will not show SERIALIZER_BUILD=v2 or a deliberate local marker change, and deployment inspection will identify an older bundle.
debug_journal.experiment: Before forming a new source-level hypothesis, query the live marker, deliberately change the local marker, query the service again, and inspect the deployed artifact.
debug_journal.result: Neither local marker appeared in the service, and inspection found yesterday's serializer-v1 bundle. A clean rebuild and deploy made SERIALIZER_BUILD=v2 visible.

debug_journal.hypothesis: The current v2 serializer maps the validation exception through the generic error adapter.
debug_journal.prediction: Tracing only the adapter branch will show the validation exception entering the generic mapping.
debug_journal.experiment: Repeat the unknown-enum reproduction against the rebuilt v2 bundle while tracing only the adapter branch and changing no code.
debug_journal.result: The trace confirmed the validation exception entered the generic branch; the current bundle returned INTERNAL_ERROR instead of UNSUPPORTED_ENUM.
